headline: Wells Fargo Maintains Equal-Weight on Stanley Black & Decker, Lowers Price Target to $75
summary: Wells Fargo  analyst Sam Reid   maintains Stanley Black & Decker (NYSE:SWK) with a Equal-Weight and lowers the price target from $82 to $75.

headline: Shares of machinery companies are trading higher amid overall market strength and easing energy costs due to the U.S.-Iran ceasefire agreement and President Trump's social media post that signaled a de-escalation of regional conflict and supply-chain disruption.
summary: Shares of machinery companies are trading higher amid overall market strength and easing energy costs due to the U.S.-Iran ceasefire agreement and President Trump's social media post that signaled a de-escalation of regional conflict and supply-chain disruption.

headline: Boomers and Retirees Are Sticking With 5 of the Highest-Yielding Dividend Kings
summary: Depending on who you ask, there is a chance we will get no interest rate cuts in 2026, or if we do, it’ll be just one. Inflation fueled by higher energy costs, tariffs, and a host of other factors could be the reason the Federal Reserve cites for not lowering rates until those rising costs ... Boomers and Retirees Are Sticking With 5 of the Highest-Yielding Dividend Kings

headline: What to Expect From Stanley Black & Decker's Q1 2026 Earnings Report
summary: Stanley Black & Decker is poised to announce its first-quarter results later this month, and analysts predict a double-digit decrease in the company’s bottom-line figure.

headline: Jim Cramer's top 10 things to watch in the stock market Wednesday
summary: Oil prices are plunging and stocks are surging after Washington and Tehran agreed to a two-week ceasefire.
